title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - CDAC - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
jsonLd.skills: MongoDB, Java, Rust, Git, TypeScript, Agile/Scrum, Kubernetes, Node.js
